Operating Brain / Pattern Factory

Install the operating brain for AI-native execution.

SourceA turns scattered tools, prompts, agents, policies, workflows, and decisions into a coherent execution layer with definitions, gates, receipts, routing, and improvement loops.

CoherenceDefinitions & operating memory
ControlGates & human escalation
ProofReceipt-backed execution
LearningSafe improvement loops
Pattern modulesAnti-Theater · Zero-Drift · Soup Wall

BuyerFounders & AI-native operators

Verify in 5 minutes: pip install sourcea-boot or run eval → BOOT_REPORT.json on disk · Live proof · PyPI v0.1.0

Problem

Most AI-native teams have tools, not a brain.

Teams collect prompts, agents, dashboards, policies, docs, automations, and workflows. The failure is coherence: no definition spine, no receipt trail, no stable routing, no safe sandbox-to-live path.

Fragmented execution

Work happens across chats, SaaS tools, documents, code repositories, and agents without one operating memory.

Theater risk

Automation can produce motion without proof: fake progress, unverified claims, uncontrolled retries, and drift.

Founder/operator overload

The founder or operator becomes the manual router, verifier, memory, and escalation system. That does not scale.

Install path

Operating Brain Install

SourceA packages recurring execution failures into installable control patterns: definitions, gates, receipts, workflows, approvals, memory, and improvement loops.

01Extract definitionsLock the terms, claims, boundaries, roles, and current truth.
02Map workflowsIdentify handoffs, agents, tools, approvals, and failure surfaces.
03Install gatesAdd policy, claim, evidence, and human-escalation controls.
04Create receiptsTurn execution into auditable traces and proof artifacts.
05Route workersSeparate sandbox exploration from controlled live execution.
06Improve loopsUse failures and signals to update the operating brain safely.

Evidence

Proof on disk

Operating Brain patterns are validated with machine receipts — not narrative claims. Public portable eval is live for diligence.

Portable eval4 checkssourcea-boot PASS/BLOCK — policy, provider, receipt freshness, queue truth. Run eval · Live proof · GitHub · PyPI
Case proofPureFlowLive trades operator proof chain — 48-hour MVP path. Case study · receipt-backed delivery.
CapabilityOperating Brain Install + Pattern Factory modules
ReceiptsBOOT_REPORT.json · execution trail · decision receipts
GatesPolicy · claim · evidence · human escalation before live routing
RoutingSandbox workers → receipt engine → controlled live execution
TelemetryValidator PASS/BLOCK · improvement-loop signals on disk
Trust layerDefinitions spine · anti-theater gate · zero-drift policy

Illustrative — client topology produced during Brain Audit.

Procurement pack — ISO 42001 mapping, data handling, reference pilot structure (educational maps · not certification).

Modules

Pattern modules

Each module fixes one class of operational failure and can be installed separately or as part of a full Brain Foundation Sprint.

Anti-Theater Gate

Prevents unverified claims, fake completion, and status theater by requiring evidence before promotion.

  • Claim gates
  • Receipt checks
  • Live-signal validation

Zero-Drift Policy

Keeps definitions, boundaries, and current truth stable while allowing learning and iteration.

  • Definition spine
  • Drift detection
  • Controlled updates

Soup Wall

Separates messy agent exploration from production surfaces so experimentation cannot poison the live system.

  • Sandbox workers
  • Review gates
  • Live merge controls

Founder Load Reducer

Routes repetitive decisions, checks, and handoffs into controlled loops to reduce manual founder time.

  • Task router
  • Approval ladder
  • Daily operating brief

Receipt Engine

Records what was done, by what system, under which rule, with what evidence.

  • Execution trail
  • Decision receipts
  • Audit-ready summary

Auto-Heal Loop

Turns recurring failures into improvement tasks, tests, and controlled upgrades.

  • Failure capture
  • Fix proposal
  • Gated merge

Preview

Read-only sandbox routing preview

Illustrative gate counts and receipt coverage only — not client telemetry. Live routing wired during Brain Foundation Sprint.

Sample data · read-only preview
847Pre-execution approvals logged
12Policy denials before live routing
96%Executions with audit trail
4Policy · claim · evidence · human
3Exploration lanes isolated
5Queued safe loop updates

Engagement

Engagement model

Start with one narrow operating-brain surface. Install coherence before autonomy.

Brain Audit

Map the client stack, drift risks, missing gates, automation theater, and first 5 installable patterns.

Brain Foundation Sprint

Install definitions, routing, receipts, human gates, and 1–3 pattern modules.

Managed Brain Ops

Operate improvement loops, review receipts, and evolve the control plane over time.

Build the first operating-brain surface

For founders, AI-native teams, and execution-heavy operators who need coherence before autonomy.
